title: helenium insulare
intro: Helenium insulare, also known as Insular Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helenium insulare include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Helenium insulare can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
